query: /nerdbot create "field guide to incident postmortems" as an Obsidian vault
expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to the Create workflow and treats Obsidian-native output as the default
Agent loads references/kb-architecture.md and references/obsidian-vaults.md before proposing starter files
Agent scaffolds shared .obsidian surfaces, raw/assets, config/obsidian-vault.md, indexes, and the append-only activity log
Agent uses frontmatter, [[wikilinks]], and Dataview-friendly metadata in starter notes rather than plain Markdown-only templates
